org.jline.reader.Binding

Package
Description
org.jline.reader
JLine 3 Reader Package - Core components for building interactive command-line interfaces.
org.jline.reader.impl
JLine 3 Reader Implementation Package.

  • Uses of Binding in org.jline.reader

    Subinterfaces of Binding in org.jline.reader
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    Widget
    A Widget represents an action that can be bound to a key sequence in the LineReader.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Macro
    A macro that executes a sequence of keystrokes when invoked.
    class 
    Reference
    A reference to a Widget by name.
    Methods in org.jline.reader that return types with arguments of type Binding
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Map<String,KeyMap<Binding>>
    LineReader.defaultKeyMaps()
    Returns the default key maps used by the LineReader.
    Map<String,KeyMap<Binding>>
    LineReader.getKeyMaps()
    Returns all key maps registered with this LineReader.
    KeyMap<Binding>
    LineReader.getKeys()
    Returns the currently active key map.
